items.briefing:
Microsoft has released an urgent out-of-band patch for SharePoint, meaning it was pushed outside the normal update schedule due to severity — if your organisation uses SharePoint, ensure IT applies this update promptly. Separately, thousands of GitHub repositories have been infected with "Megalodon" malware, which is a concern for any staff who download software or code from GitHub. Only use trusted, verified sources when downloading tools or files.

Check Point is also warning that many organisations are adopting AI faster than they are securing it, leaving potential gaps in data protection. If your RTO is using AI tools, make sure sensitive student or staff data isn't being entered into unvetted platforms.

**Practical tip:** Before using any AI tool for work purposes, check with your IT or management team that it has been approved for handling organisational data.

featured.title: EC-Council launches AI governance framework & tool
featured.quote: Only 1% of Australian leaders think their AI governance is mature, creating urgent compliance risks.
